Idioma.MSG_CuandoLaListaEstaVacia: -- They have not aggregated groups of components to this business. --
Idioma.AYUDA_ComponenteExclusivo: Exclusive component: Will restrict that more than one component of this group be aggregate to a same action of personnel.
Idioma.MSG_NoPuedeExistirOtroGrupoDeComponentes: Already exists, not another group of salary components with the same code can exist.
Idioma.MSG_SeleccionarUnaTablaSalarialParaPoder: Should select a Salary Chart, to be able to give maintenance to its force.
